title: Refresh Kanbus configuration to current format

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started work: comparing /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Plexus/.kanbus.yml against /Users/ryan.porter/Projects/Kanbus/.kanbus.yml and will update to current format.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Updated .kanbus.yml to current format based on ../Kanbus/.kanbus.yml: removed deprecated null/legacy keys, switched to compact workflow lists, aligned statuses/categories/transition labels/type colors, enabled console_port 4242, and added ignore_paths entry for features/project while keeping project_key=plx and existing Snyk org settings.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Validation checks: kbs validate exits 0. Initially mirrored beads_compatibility=true from example, but reverted to false because this repository has no .beads directory and CLI commands failed with 'no .beads directory'.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Completed: refreshed .kanbus.yml to current schema based on ../Kanbus/.kanbus.yml, retained Plexus-specific settings, and verified compatibility with kbs validate + kbs list.
